overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green jacket walking through a densely fogged suburban neighborhood. The atmosphere is oppressive and ominous with extremely limited visibility, featuring traditional wooden American houses, parked vehicles, and overgrown vegetation lining a concrete sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy suburban sidewalk with wooden porch stairs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy sidewalk, passing a wooden staircase and approaching a red parked sedan

entered.detail: weathered wooden staircase with white railings attached to a house porch
two-story house with white wooden siding and a covered porch
thick tree trunk with sparse autumn foliage visible through the fog
tall wooden utility pole with power lines extending into the fog
red sedan parked on the grass beside the sidewalk, partially obscured by fog
standard brown mailbox on a post near the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk in a densely fogged suburban neighborhood. A wooden staircase and white-sided house line the right side while a red sedan emerges from the fog on the left. The atmosphere is silent and oppressive with extremely limited visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy residential street with utility poles and mailboxes

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path past mailboxes and utility poles, with distant houses barely visible through the thick fog

entered.detail: faint outline of a house visible through the dense fog ahead
white lattice fence section attached to a house porch
black trash can sitting near the porch steps

segments.scene_description: Having passed the red car, the character continues through the fog past mailboxes and utility poles. The initial house recedes into the fog behind while distant structures become faintly visible ahead. The environment remains consistently desolate and mist-shrouded.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching large two-story house in dense fog

agents.ego_description: walking toward a large two-story house that materializes from the fog, revealing porch details and architectural features

entered.detail: substantial two-story house with white siding and multiple windows emerging from the fog
white wooden porch railing with vertical balusters
external air conditioning unit mounted on the house wall

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a large two-story house that looms into view through the fog. Details of the porch railing and exterior fixtures become visible as the earlier mailbox and utility pole pass out of sight behind. The fog maintains its dense, limiting presence throughout the approach.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate suburban neighborhood where a dense, oppressive fog obscures the surroundings. It begins with the character walking along a concrete sidewalk past a white-sided house and a wooden staircase, as a red sedan slowly emerges from the thick mist on the left. As the character passes the vehicle, the scene shifts toward a stretch of mailboxes and utility poles while the initial house recedes into the gray haze. The camera then continues forward through the shroud of fog, causing distant structures to gradually materialize from the gloom. Finally, the environment opens up to reveal a large two-story house that looms into view, its porch railing and exterior fixtures becoming clear as the previous landmarks vanish behind the character.
